message:
fix: restore displaced doc comment on list_conversations_for_lexical_rebuild

The insertion of build_lexical_rebuild_lookups accidentally merged its
doc comment with the existing comment block for
list_conversations_for_lexical_rebuild, leaving the latter undocumented
and the former with a misleading preamble.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
